text: Battery backup is outstanding — easily lasts 2 days with moderate use. Camera quality surprised me for this price range. Build feels premium, no flex. Only gripe: the charger is slow. Would buy again.
I received this product for free in exchange for an honest review. Works as described. Happy with the purchase.
Good product good quality good price good delivery good packaging.

Screen cracked after 3 weeks of normal use. Customer service said it's physical damage and won't replace under warranty. Paid ₹800 for a screen protector which I applied carefully from day one. Avoid.
Excellent product! Best product! Amazing product! Buy this product! Great product! Five stars product!

Bought for my mother who has arthritis. The buttons are large and the font size can be increased — she figured it out herself in 10 minutes. Call quality is clear even on speaker. Charging port is slightly stiff but manageable.
Got this as a gift sample to review. The quality is nice. Recommended for everyone.

Returned after 2 days. The earbuds keep falling out during jogging. Sound is decent but the fit is terrible for anyone with smaller ears. No silicone tip in small size included in India variant unlike the international one.
Very good product. Very nice quality. Very fast delivery. Very happy with purchase. Highly recommended.

Motor burned out after 14 months — one month past warranty. The smell was alarming; nearly caused a fire. Flipkart refused return since it's out of warranty. Attaching photos. Third such incident I've read about for this model.
I was provided this mixer at a discounted rate to write a review. Honest opinion: blades are sharp and powerful, container doesn't leak, noise level is acceptable for the class.
Used daily for 8 months — still works perfectly. Cleaned the filter twice. Water taste is noticeably cleaner. Installation took 45 minutes with the manual, no plumber needed.
Best buy! Amazing! Perfect! Must buy! Love it! Great! Superb! Excellent! Top quality! Highly recommended!
Fan wobbles slightly at speed 5. At speeds 1-4 it's fine. I tightened the blade bolts — helped a little. Probably a minor QC miss. Would rate 3.5 if possible.
Sponsored review. Was sent this product for evaluation. Looks premium. Functions well. No complaints so far.
The pressure cooker whistle is too loud — startled my dog multiple times. Otherwise it's solid, lid seals properly and the handles don't get hot. Gasket seems durable.
Bahut achha product hai. Delivery bhi fast thi. Quality ekdum best hai. Sab ko lena chahiye.
Yeh product mujhe free mila tha review ke liye. Sach mein kaafi achha hai. Battery life 2 din chalti hai. Camera bhi theek hai.
Paani ka taste bilkul badal gaya hai. Pehle RO ke baad bhi thoda smell aata tha, ab nahi aata. Installation ka banda sahi time pe aaya. 6 mahine ho gaye, abhi tak koi problem nahi.
Screen guard chipak hi nahi raha. Teen baar try kiya. Dust particles aa jaate hain beech mein. Paise waste ho gaye. Ek star bhi zyada hai.
Achha hai. Theek hai. Sahi hai. Zyada kuch bolne ki zaroorat nahi.
Muft mila tha isliye de raha hoon review. Box mein sab kuch tha. Chalata bhi hai. Recommend karta hoon.

Geyser ka thermostat 3 mahine mein kharab ho gaya. Technician ne bola ki andar ka part substandard hai. Company ne warranty mein sahi kiya but ek hafte lag gaye. Ab theek chal raha hai. 3 star isliye ki jaldi kharab hua.
Bahut sundar design hai! Bahut achi quality hai! Bahut fast delivery thi! Bahut khush hoon!
Size runs large — ordered M, had to exchange for S. Exchange process was smooth, took 4 days. Fabric is soft and the color hasn't faded after 6 washes. Stitching looks solid.
In return for a complimentary unit I am leaving this feedback. The product performs its stated function adequately.
Broke after one use. The plastic clip snapped while clipping it to my bag. For ₹1,200 this is unacceptable. The brand's response was to suggest I 'be more careful.' Never again.
Moisturizer absorbs well without leaving grease. Mild fragrance — not overpowering. SPF 30 is actual sun protection, not just a label claim (tested). Bit pricey but worth it for daily use.
Good. Nice. Okay. Fine. Average. Normal. Works.
Shampoo made my scalp itchy after 3 uses. Checked ingredients — contains sulphates despite the 'sulphate-free' claim on the front label. Read the back carefully before buying.
Received product free for review purposes. Texture is smooth. Smells nice. Skin feels good after use. Totally recommend to all.
Dupatta color bled onto the kurta in the first wash even though I used cold water and a color-catcher sheet. Now both pieces are ruined. The kurta alone cost ₹2,400.

Got this at a discount through a seller promotion. That said — genuinely impressed. The motor is quieter than my old Prestige, and the jar design makes cleaning easy. I'd have bought it at full price too.
Product is good product is nice product is best product is great product for family use best product ever.

Using this air purifier for 4 months. AQI in my flat went from ~180 to ~55 on bad days (I track it with a separate sensor). Filter replacement was straightforward. Noise at sleep mode is barely noticeable.
Delivery was fast. Good packaging. Product is okay. Not bad. Would consider buying again.
I got this watch as part of a review program run by the brand. It looks premium. The strap is comfortable. The display is clear. Time keeping is accurate. I recommend it.

Had high hopes based on reviews but the zoom quality at 3x is noticeably worse than my 2-year-old phone. Low light performance is acceptable. Heating during recording is a real issue — 8 minutes of video and the back is uncomfortably warm.
Returned it. The smell inside the bag was chemical and strong even after airing for a week. Might be off-gassing from whatever material is used. Not safe for food items.
Five stars is the minimum for this brand. You will not regret. The best in the market. World class. Everyone in my family bought one.
